REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 15267081) FILED BY DEFENDANT 899 VALENCIA 20, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 899 VALENCIA 20, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION IS GRANTED. ALL CLAIMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AND ANY CROSS-CLAIMS BY 899 VALENCIA 20, LLC ALLEGING MONIES OWED BY OR TO 899 VALENCIA 20, LLC RESULTING FROM WORK PERFORMED BY PLAINTIFF ARE TO BE ARBITRATED PER THE PARTIES' CONTRACT. ALL OTHER CLAIMS AND CROSS-CLAIMS ARE STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION OR FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/HK

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT 899 VALENCIA 20, LLC's Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action is Granted. All claims filed by plaintiff and any cross-claims by 899 Valencia 20, LLC alleging monies owed by or to 899 Valencia 20, LLC resulting from work performed by plaintiff are to be arbitrated per the parties' contract. All other claims and cross-claims are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration or further order of the court. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
